data.title: 'Dogecoin Killer' Shiba Inu Burns 17 Million SHIB, Traders Predict 'Parabolic Potential'
data.description: ‘Dogecoin Killer' Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) is holding firm at a crucial horizontal support level, fueling speculation of significant upside potential.

Bollinger Motors Teams Up With Bergey's To Electrify The Mid-Atlantic Region
data.description: Mullen Automotive disclosed that its subsidiary, Bollinger Motors, has appointed Bergey's Truck Centers as an official dealer.

data.title: What's Going On With Bank Of America (BAC) Shares
data.description: Bank of America shares are trading lower by 3% in December but are higher by 34% on a year-to-date basis. The company has received a number of analyst rating updates and was named an Official Partner for the FIFA Club World Cup 2025 last week.
